org_constraint: The article must incorporate the keyword "cognitive development".
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "cognitive development" in the article.
instruction: Write an article about the merits of reducing screen time for children. The article must incorporate the keyword "cognitive development". Avoid using the keyword "cognitive development" in the article.
